file_insights.purpose: Document known test flakiness and parallelism issues
key_findings: Tests exhibit flaky behavior with default parallelism across multiple test suites
Root cause: cargo build process file lock contention and resource contention
All 428 tests pass in single-threaded mode

file_insights.changes: Fixed clippy warnings in test module
modifications: Converted runtime assertions to const blocks in default_memory_ttl_is_reasonable test
Moved ONE_YEAR calculation to const declaration

file_insights.changes: Major refactoring for clippy compliance and indentation
modifications: Corrected indentation for 232+ lines in inner loops and conditionals
Improved struct initialization and field handling

file_insights.changes: Removed unused variable and fixed initialization pattern
modifications: Changed to struct initialization instead of field reassignment

file_insights.changes: Removed unused code and fixed parameter types
modifications: Removed unused run() function causing clippy warning

patterns_discovered.description: Test suite exhibits intermittent failures when run with default parallelism; different tests fail on different runs
patterns_discovered.cause: Cargo build file lock contention, process spawning timing dependencies, temporary directory cleanup overlap

patterns_discovered.description: Multiple modules contained clippy warnings: const assertions, parameter type hints, unused code
patterns_discovered.resolution_strategy: Systematic cleanup across all affected modules

patterns_discovered.description: merge_gate.rs had significant indentation inconsistencies in nested loops and conditionals

gotchas_discovered.impact: Would fail to properly filter card directories

gotchas_discovered.symptom: Different test failures on different runs (non-deterministic)
gotchas_discovered.root_cause: Multiple cargo build processes competing for package cache locks

approach_outcome.objective: Ensure make check passes (or document acceptable failures)
approach_outcome.documentation_approach: Rather than force parallel test stability, documented the known flakiness as acceptable for CI environments

recommendations.suggestion: Consider updating `make check` target to use `cargo test --jobs 1 -- --test-threads=1` for deterministic CI runs
recommendations.rationale: Trades build time for test reliability; suitable for CI pipelines

recommendations.item: Accept Test Flakiness as Known Issue
recommendations.suggestion: Document that parallel test execution has acceptable race conditions; single-threaded mode is stable
recommendations.rationale: Tests are logically sound; parallelism issue is infrastructure-level

recommendations.suggestion: Add note to contributing docs: run `cargo test --jobs 1 -- --test-threads=1` locally for reliable results
recommendations.rationale: Prevents developer confusion about intermittent failures

recommendations.suggestion: Schedule periodic clippy runs to catch warnings before they accumulate
recommendations.rationale: Prevents similar accumulation in future; many warnings were trivial to fix
